query:
SELECT fsl.id, fi.name as feedItem, fsl.transactionType, fsl.qty, fsl.unitCost, fsl.totalCost, fsl.transactionDate, fsl.notes
FROM feed_stock_ledger fsl
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = fsl.feedItemId
WHERE fsl.deletedAt IS NULL AND fsl.id >= 17
ORDER BY fsl.transactionDate, fi.name;
